name: Supreme Chocolate Mint Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease cookie sheets lightly.
In a large bowl, combine flour, 1 cup cocoa, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
In a large bowl, beat sugar and brown sugar with margarine until light and fluffy. Add eggs; blend well. Stir in flour mixture; mix well. Stir in mint chocolate chips. Drop by tablespoonfuls about 3 inches apart onto prepared cookie sheets; flatten slightly. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until set. Cool for 1 minute, then remove from cookie sheets. Allow cookies to cool completely.
In a medium saucepan, combine all glaze ingredients except vanilla. Bring to a boil and continue boiling for 1 minute. Stir in vanilla; allow to cool. Cool glaze until smooth with setting consistency. Drizzle over cooled cookies, allowing the glaze to set.
Tip: To cool frosting quickly, place saucepan on ice in a large bowl. If the glaze becomes too thick, reheat it until it reaches a spreading consistency.
